listitem.para: Valid video-writer handle returned by a successful call to avifile.
Image to append. It is converted and resized to the writer format when required.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: addframe is retained for compatibility and uses the same native writer implementation as aviaddframe. New code should use aviaddframe.
The writer must have been created successfully. An error from avifile means that no valid handle exists for subsequent frame or close operations.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: Documented as a deprecated compatibility alias of aviaddframe.
